description.comment: React Bootstrap components that favor composition and control; no jQuery or Bootstrap JavaScript dependencies

active-maintenance.comment: Active - v9.2.3 released September 26, 2024; 1,364 commits; 262+ contributors; 419k dependent projects

framework.comment: React exclusive; v9.x supports Bootstrap 5, v8.x supports Bootstrap 4

styling-approach.comment: Relies entirely on Bootstrap's stylesheet; requires separate Bootstrap CSS import; supports both vanilla CSS and Sass customization

component-model.comment: Styled components following Bootstrap's visual design; compatible with Bootstrap themes

typescript.comment: 16.5% of codebase is TypeScript; includes type definitions

ssr-compatible.comment: Works with SSR; may require 'use client' directive in Next.js App Router for components using browser APIs

rsc-compatible.comment: Not compatible with React Server Components; components must be client components

design-system.comment: Implements Bootstrap 5 design system; compatible with Bootstrap ecosystem

dark-mode.comment: Bootstrap 5.3+ includes built-in color mode support for light/dark themes via data-bs-theme attribute

theming-system.comment: Theming through Bootstrap's Sass variables; extensive customization of colors, spacing, typography

css-variables.comment: Bootstrap 5 uses extensive CSS custom properties for theming; prefixed with --bs-

design-tokens.comment: Bootstrap provides design tokens via Sass variables and CSS custom properties

rtl-support.comment: Bootstrap 5 includes built-in RTL support with separate RTL stylesheet

component-count.comment: ~45 distinct components across layout, navigation, forms, and UI categories; 95 total exports including sub-components

text-input.comment: Input component with text, password, email, search variants

select.comment: Input component with type='select' for single-select dropdown

multi-select.comment: No built-in multi-select component; native HTML multiple attribute available but no enhanced UI

checkbox.comment: Input component with type='checkbox'; supports FormGroup for groups

radio.comment: Input component with type='radio' for radio button groups

switch-toggle.comment: Input component with type='switch' for toggle switches (Bootstrap 5 feature)

slider.comment: Input component with type='range'; single thumb only, no dual-thumb range slider

number-input.comment: Uses native HTML number input via Input type='number'; no custom increment/decrement UI

color-picker.comment: Uses native HTML color input; no custom picker UI

date-picker.comment: No built-in date picker component; uses native HTML date input

time-picker.comment: No built-in time picker component; uses native HTML time input

file-upload.comment: Input with type='file' for file uploads; no built-in preview

input-groups.comment: InputGroup and InputGroupText components for combining inputs with text, buttons, or addons

input-with-dropdown.comment: InputGroup supports dropdown buttons attached to inputs

button-groups.comment: ButtonGroup and ButtonToolbar for grouped buttons

split-button.comment: ButtonDropdown can be configured as split button with main action and dropdown menu

table.comment: Table component with striped, bordered, hover, and responsive variants

data-table.comment: No advanced data table with sorting, filtering, or pagination; basic Table only

list-view.comment: ListGroup component with ListGroupItem, ListGroupItemHeading, ListGroupItemText

card.comment: Card component with header, body, footer, image variants; CardDeck, CardGroup, CardColumns for layouts

tag-chip-pill.comment: Badge with pill prop for rounded tag/pill appearance; Tag component also available

alert.comment: Alert component with dismissible and styled variants; UncontrolledAlert for self-managing dismiss state

toast-notification.comment: Toast, ToastHeader, ToastBody components for temporary notifications

progress-bar.comment: Progress component with labels, striped, and animated variants

spinner-loader.comment: Spinner component with border and grow variants

skeleton.comment: Placeholder and PlaceholderButton components for loading skeletons

modal-dialog.comment: Modal component with ModalHeader, ModalBody, ModalFooter; focus trapping and keyboard navigation

drawer-sheet.comment: Offcanvas, OffcanvasHeader, OffcanvasBody components for slide-in panels from any edge

popover.comment: Popover component with PopoverHeader, PopoverBody; UncontrolledPopover for self-managing state

tooltip.comment: Tooltip component with multiple placements; UncontrolledTooltip for self-managing state

dropdown-menu.comment: Dropdown, DropdownToggle, DropdownMenu, DropdownItem components; UncontrolledDropdown available

tabs.comment: TabContent and TabPane components for tab-based navigation; works with Nav components

vertical-tabs.comment: No built-in vertical tabs; Nav with flex-column can achieve similar effect

breadcrumb.comment: Breadcrumb and BreadcrumbItem components for hierarchical navigation

pagination.comment: Pagination, PaginationItem, PaginationLink components for page navigation

navigation-menu.comment: Navbar, NavbarBrand, NavbarToggler, NavbarText, Nav, NavItem, NavLink components for responsive navigation

sidebar.comment: No dedicated sidebar component; Offcanvas can be used for collapsible sidebars

grid.comment: Container, Row, Col components for 12-column responsive grid system

stack.comment: No dedicated Stack component; use Row/Col with flex utilities

container.comment: Container component with fluid and responsive breakpoint options

divider.comment: No dedicated divider component; use <hr> with Bootstrap classes

aspect-ratio.comment: Bootstrap includes ratio helper classes; no dedicated React component but compatible with className

collapsible.comment: Collapse and UncontrolledCollapse components for expandable/collapsible content with animation

rich-text-editors.comment: No official rich text editor integrations

form-libraries.comment: No official form library integrations; compatible with any React form library via standard patterns

animation-libraries.comment: Uses react-transition-group for built-in transitions (Fade, Collapse); no documented external animation library integration

icon-libraries.comment: No bundled icons; any icon library can be used independently

date-libraries.comment: No date picker or date library integration

aria-compliant.comment: Components implement WAI-ARIA patterns; 508 compliant as much as Bootstrap itself

keyboard-navigation.comment: Keyboard navigation/control of dropdowns and interactive components

screen-reader-tested.comment: Bootstrap components tested to meet WCAG 2.0 AA/AAA standards for keyboard and screen reader users

focus-management.comment: Modal traps focus; proper focus management in overlays

wcag-level.comment: Bootstrap aims for WCAG 2.0 AA/AAA compliance; some components like Accordion may need additional aria-expanded

accessibility-rating.comment: Adequate - ARIA-compliant, keyboard navigation, but some components may lack full aria attributes compared to official Bootstrap jQuery; users can add their own aria-* attributes

bundle-size-full.comment: ~22 kB minified + gzipped; 6 dependencies including @popperjs/core and react-transition-group

bundle-size-core.comment: Tree-shakeable; actual bundle depends on components imported

tree-shakeable.comment: Supports tree-shaking; uses Rollup build that preserves ES2015 imports for optimal tree-shaking

zero-runtime.comment: Requires JavaScript runtime for component behavior; styling via Bootstrap CSS

lazy-loading.comment: Components can be dynamically imported and loaded on demand

documentation-quality.comment: Adequate - Storybook-based docs with examples; API reference through Storybook controls; some gaps in comprehensive guides

interactive-docs.comment: Storybook-based documentation with interactive component examples

storybook.comment: Official Storybook serves as primary documentation; available at reactstrap.github.io

figma-kit.comment: No official Figma kit; community Bootstrap 5 UI kits available on Figma Community

cli-generator.comment: No CLI tool; install via npm/yarn

commercial-support.comment: MIT open source; community support via GitHub

style-override.comment: Override via className, inline style prop, or Bootstrap CSS variables; cssModule prop for CSS Modules support

compound-components.comment: Uses compound component pattern (e.g., Card + CardBody + CardHeader, Modal + ModalHeader + ModalBody)

render-props.comment: No render props pattern; uses traditional prop-based customization

slots.comment: No named slots pattern; uses compound components and children prop

unstyled-mode.comment: No unstyled mode; components require Bootstrap CSS for proper appearance
